[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111101110 7
1 101100111 6
2 101100111 6
3 111110011 7
4 111111111 a
5 110111111 8

7 011001000 3
